examples: 'It won't be easy,' he said grimly.
The pirates listened grimly, and then replaced the mushroom.
The gaoler nodded grimly, laying his withered hand on the shoulder of the miserable Toad.
The Savages are grimly aware that they will have to do the same thing soon.
His cape swirls in the wind that screams around the tower and he looks grimly down upon the city.
